creator: linuxhelp@freenet.de
text:
Hello@All

on a fresh setup "AMD64 FreeBSD 11.0 Current" 
"dump" crashes if it backup a slice /usr via nfs to a 
NFS Share Debian Server. The problem is seen if a user
saves tar.gz Files over ~2GB on his own home (Laptop-Backup-home.tgz)

Backup command:
$/sbin/dump -0Lauf /archiv/usr-20150324.dump /dev/mirror/gm0p5 

Exports: /archiv \     192.168.XXX.XXX/24(sync,anonuid=0,anongid=0,no_subtree_check,no_root_squash,rw)
